notes.prefillRead: StreamBuilder over repo.watchBusiness() -> BusinessProfile? (single row, limit(1)). Screen prefills businessName, phone, and category (only if category is in the static _categories list) once, guarded by a _loaded flag.
notes.saveMapping: repo.saveBusiness(BusinessProfilesCompanion) upserts the single business-profile row (insert if none, else update). This screen only writes businessName, category, and phone; ownerName, currency, reminderTone, plan, paystackSubaccount are set by other screens (setup/templates/subscription/payout) and left untouched here. Phone is normalized to digits-only before save (replaceAll non-digit).
notes.entityShape: BusinessProfile is a single-row (per-tenant) drift table BusinessProfiles: id (int autoincrement as-built -> UUIDv7 string per S-2), businessName, ownerName, phone, category, currency, reminderTone all TEXT with defaults; plan TEXT (canonical lowercase id per S-3, defaults recorded elsewhere); paystackSubaccount TEXT nullable (Paystack subaccount seam). No updatedAt/version columns as-built (sync agent adds per conventions).
notes.categoriesReference: Static const _categories list (business_profile_screen.dart lines 13-19): ['Provision store','Pharmacy','Building materials','Fashion & fabric','POS agent'] — reference values only, category is stored as free TEXT (the DB default is 'Provisions', a different string). No backend enum/endpoint implied; treat as client-side suggestion list. Note the onboarding setup screen has a longer, different _categories list — no canonical catalog exists.
notes.logo: _logoUploaded = true is a hardcoded mock; there is NO real upload wired. 'Change'/'Remove'/'Upload logo' controls only toggle local state and show snackbars ('Logo updated'). A logo upload for the business profile is IMPLIED (special.uploads:true) but unbuilt — no logo field exists on the BusinessProfiles table today. logoUrl added to the read shape as the anticipated field; not currently persisted or sent by saveBusiness.
notes.authRationale: Owner manages business profile (receipts/reminders identity). Per conventions roles owner|staff; staff cannot touch profile-level business settings — default this surface to @Roles('owner').
